title: Mounted Local Thumbnail Quality Route
summary: Mounted the Thumbnail Quality route shell in the local Studio app server and retired the old Jekyll route shell.
effect: The local Studio app now serves /studio/thumbnail-quality/?mode=manage with the existing vanilla Thumbnail Quality browser module and route-ready contract. The route keeps the checked-in preview data behavior and disables refresh when the catalogue sibling service is unavailable, and the old Jekyll /studio/thumbnail-quality/ shell has been removed. The catalogue refresh API remains a sibling call for a later route-family API consolidation slice.
verification: Python compile checks passed for the touched Studio app server, view, config, and smoke files
